cases.prompt: 구독 관리 서비스 골라줘. RevenueCat vs Stripe 비교해줘.

assertions.text: Compares subscription management services (RevenueCat/Stripe Billing/Chargebee/Paddle/Lemon Squeezy).
Gives a recommendation based on platform and scale.
Provides an integration guide for the selected service.

cases.prompt: Which billing platform should we use for subscription management?

assertions.text: Recommends a platform fit for the user's platform/scale.
Lays out trade-offs between the candidate services.
